subtitle: Parenting Coordination Made Easy
description:
Swadl is not another baby tracker. It's a parenting coordination tool that reduces cognitive load, keeps caregivers in sync, and helps you stay on top of everything.

Whether you're co-parenting, sharing duties with a nanny, or managing it all solo, Swadl gives you one place to log, track, and hand off — so nothing falls through the cracks.

QUICK LOGGING
Log feeds, diapers, sleep, and pump sessions in seconds. Track bottle amounts in both oz and ml. See time-since-last at a glance on your dashboard.

CAREGIVER COORDINATION
Three care modes — Together, Shifts, and Nanny — adapt to how your family works. Hand off with auto-generated briefings so the next caregiver knows exactly what happened.

DAILY SUMMARIES & TRENDS
Day and week views show feeding totals, diaper counts, sleep hours, and pump output. Share a formatted PDF report with your pediatrician in one tap.

SMART CHORE MANAGEMENT
Pre-seeded recurring chores (sterilize bottles, wash pump parts, prep daycare bag) with animated completion. Swipe to mark done.

BUILT FOR REAL PARENTS
Warm, nursery-inspired design that feels handcrafted — not clinical. Dark mode for late-night feeds. Multi-baby support. Real-time sync across caregivers.

PRIVACY FIRST
Your family's data stays private. COPPA-compliant. No ads. No selling data. Delete your account and all data anytime.
shortDescription: Coordinate parenting duties, log feeds, diapers, sleep & pumps, and share reports with your pediatrician.
